faqs.question: What signs of termites should Pleasant Plains homeowners look for?
faqs.answer: Look for mud tubes along foundation walls, discarded wings near windows and doors, hollow-sounding wood when tapped, visible wood damage, and small piles of frass (termite droppings). Pleasant Plains' older homes are especially vulnerable, so regular inspections of basements, crawl spaces, and wooden structures near the ground are essential.
